482 DOWN_DPRSD_FREQ_ADMSN_CD DOWN_DPRSD_FREQ_ADMSN_CD Mood: Feeling down, depressed, or hopeless: F (A) CHAR 1 This column documents, at the time of admission, the frequency with which the patient has been feeling down, depressed, or hopeless. 0 = Never or 1 day 
1 = 2-6 days 
2 = 7-11 days 
3 = 12-14 days 
- = Not Assessed/No Information 
^ = Blank
